struct SensorReading {
    timestamp: u64,
    value: f64,
    is_anomaly: bool,
}

fn analyze_readings(readings: &[SensorReading]) -> (f64, f64, usize) {
    // GOOD: single fused pass
    let mut sum = 0.0f64;
    let mut max_val = f64::NEG_INFINITY;
    let mut anomaly_count = 0usize;

    for r in readings {
        sum += r.value;
        if r.value > max_val {
            max_val = r.value;
        }
        if r.is_anomaly {
            anomaly_count += 1;
        }
    }

    let mean = sum / readings.len() as f64;
    (mean, max_val, anomaly_count)
}
